skills.name: agent-builder
skills.description: Build production LLM agents with LangGraph — tools, memory, streaming, multi-agent patterns, and error handling.

skills.name: api-design
skills.description: REST API design: URL conventions, HTTP status codes, error formats, pagination, versioning, and OpenAPI docs.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: code-reviewer
skills.description: Five-axis structured code review: correctness, security, performance, maintainability, test coverage. Severity-labeled findings.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: cost-tracker
skills.description: Track, estimate, and optimize LLM API costs across OpenAI, Anthropic, Bedrock, and Gemini. Finds your biggest cost drivers.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: debug-agent
skills.description: Systematic root cause analysis: build a feedback loop first, then hypothesize, instrument, fix. No guessing.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: doc-generator
skills.description: Generate accurate README files, API docs, inline docstrings, and changelogs. Documentation developers actually read.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: docker-agent
skills.description: Write optimized Dockerfiles, docker-compose configs, debug container issues, and reduce image sizes.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: fastapi-patterns
skills.description: FastAPI production patterns: dependency injection, streaming, background tasks, error handling, middleware, and async.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: git-workflow
skills.description: Git branching strategies, commit conventions, rebase vs merge, conflict resolution, and release tagging.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: llm-evaluator
skills.description: Evaluate LLM outputs with LLM-as-judge, automated metrics, and human evaluation. Includes regression testing framework.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: mle-workflow
skills.description: Production ML workflow: data contracts, baseline, reproducible training, evaluation gates, deployment, and monitoring.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: pr-summarizer
skills.description: Generate clear pull request descriptions from diffs: what, why, how, test plan, and risks. Context-first, not diff-first.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: prompt-optimizer
skills.description: Diagnose and rewrite underperforming LLM prompts — fix hallucination, inconsistency, wrong format, and instruction-ignoring.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: python-patterns
skills.description: Modern Python best practices: type hints, async/await, dataclasses, Pydantic, error handling, and performance patterns.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: rag-evaluator
skills.description: Evaluate RAG pipeline quality across faithfulness, relevance, and hallucination. Finds where your RAG breaks before users do.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: react-patterns
skills.description: Modern React 18+ patterns: hooks, state management, performance optimization, TypeScript, and component design.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: refactor-agent
skills.description: Safe systematic refactoring: extract functions, eliminate duplication, reduce complexity, improve naming. Tests first.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: research-agent
skills.description: Multi-source deep research with synthesis and inline citations. Structured workflow: clarify, decompose, search, synthesize.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: Security audit: OWASP Top 10, injection vulnerabilities, auth flaws, secrets exposure, IDOR, and dependency CVEs.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: sql-agent
skills.description: Write, optimize, and explain SQL queries. Covers query plans, index strategy, schema design, and safety for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: test-writer
skills.description: Write thorough, meaningful tests — happy path, edge cases, error cases, integration. Tests that actually catch bugs.
skills.author: chandrudp29

skills.name: yc-job-tracker
skills.description: Track and score AI/ML engineering jobs at YC startups. Daily refresh, relevance scoring, and new-posting alerts.
